## What changed

- Skill(s):
- User-visible behavior:

## Evidence

- [ ] Added or updated a regression test/eval for the observed failure mode
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npx skills add . --list` discovers only the intended skills
- [ ] Agent Skills validators pass

## Security and compatibility

- [ ] No credentials, install hooks, runtime self-update, telemetry, or proxy bypass
- [ ] External content is treated as untrusted data
- [ ] New side effects, network destinations, and runtime requirements are documented
- [ ] Adapted material retains attribution and license terms
